title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: Concise path summary: - Public path is: 1) `slide-script-prep` builds/validates artifacts from source input (brief → research → script lock → deck-spec/asset-plan), then 2) `slide` consumes `content.json` via `run-slide-variant-matrix.js` and generates both variants (`structured-native`, `nanobanana-manus`) in one go, then 3) waits for user selection from `variant-matrix.json` (`selection_required` is always true for the matrix output). See [slide/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md) and [slide/agents/agent.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/agent.md). Minimum required input artifacts for dual-variant runner (`run-slide-variant-matrix.js`): - Required: - `content.json` (`--input`, required) - `workflow-decision.json` (`--workflow-decision`, now required by runner validation) - Optional but effectively required for source-heavy decks: - `deck-spec.json` (`--deck-spec`) - `asset-plan.json` (`--asset-plan`) - Runner flags in current path: - `--input <content.json>` - `--delivery-dir <dir>` (optional, default `<input-dir>/delivery`) - `--deck-spec <deck-spec.json>` - `--asset-plan <asset-plan.json>` - `--workflow-decision <workflow-decision.json>` - `--open-after-pass` (optional) - `--section`, `--max-repairs` (optional) See [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js). Source-heavy note deck hard gates to respect: - In `run-slide-variant-matrix.js`: - `workflow-decision.json` must exist and be parseable. - `workflowDecision.selection_required` must be false, and `route_skill_final` must exist and equal `slide`, otherwise it fails before rendering. - Variant status needs both variants `PASS` or `PREVIEW_ONLY` to mark matrix `READY_FOR_SELECTION`. - Final deliverable requires inspection artifacts (`inspection-report.json`, `repair-log.json`, `delivery-gate.json`) and Noto Sans JP embed in generated PDF checks. - In `manus-slide-generator.js` (content-only mode, as used by runner): - `--content` + `--output` are required. - content is validated with a narrative contract: - non-cover slides require ≥2 `must_keep_points` - ≥2 `argument_layers` - `required_explanation_depth` set (`light|standard|deep`) - `forbidden_compression === true` - visible evidence requirement present where evidence is used - visible evidence slide requirement (at least `min(2, sourceSlideCount)`) with `visible-panel-required` when source references exist - In `slide-script-prep/SKILL.md` upstream (source-heavy defaults/hard gates): - source-heavy explainer should not be forced below heavy coverage defaults (28 is default unless user overrides) - source-grounded decks must not rely on footer-only evidence on key claim slides - `deck-spec.json` and `asset-plan.json` are mandatory before render handoff, and deck-spec must include per-slide evidence/coverage fields.
